generation_note: Generated from reviewed Bulbapedia Prize Pack Standard Set Foil rows only when page-level foil-pattern text explicitly routes the row to Cosmos Holofoil.

records.evidence_label: Bulbapedia Prize Pack Series 3: Grotle 7 Standard Set Foil follows Cosmos Holofoil rule
records.notes: Exact Standard Set Foil card-list row. Series rule text: Foil cards in this set have Cosmos Holofoil except for {{TCG|Pokémon V}} {{TCG|Pokémon V|Pokémon VMAX}}, {{TCG|Pokémon V|Pokémon VSTAR}}, {{TCG|Pokémon ex}} and {{TCG|Radiant Pokémon}} which retain their regular foil patterns.
